reviews.review_description: Runs fine on GO.  Nice wave shooter. Change of pace from zombie apocalypse

It's decent but becomes monotonous quickly the bosses are pretty easy to kill with patterns but some of them are almost impossible kind of a strange game good concept but they could do a whole lot more with it

reviews.review_title: Cant reload after getting so far
reviews.review_description:
I quite like this game but after getting so far it stops reloading and you are just stuck there unable to fight back.
Please fix this , so annoying to get really far and then to be unable to proceed.

Although the graphics are amazing on the gear vr version but i still think some of the textures can use just a little more improvement and i think some areas in the game are a little blurry but thats just my opinion. and if so please add rotation to gamepad support cause not everyone haves a swivel chair i totally think its mandatory. well anyway this is a awesome fps and i think it definitely deserves 5 stars but 
hopefully the dev fix those bugs that the other users are having trouble with including myself and consider those suggestions. look forward to more levels and cool stuff being added. UPDATE: You think you guys can enhance the graphics and details a bit more if possible?

developer_response.body:
Hi, Aaronb3434.
Thank you so much for the feedback! The controller issue will patch ASAP and another bugs we're still working on it too. Our Dev team are on going to solve the problems ASAP :D

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: The patch fixes all the technical issues I had running the game on the Go. It plays really well with the Go controller now. I've raised my rating.

Number 5 is a cool little wave shooter set in a world inspired by the movie Tron. Like most shooters you're rooted in one spot and you have to take out waves of enemies before you can move to the next area by looking at a teleport spot and selecting it with the controller.

Number 5 adds a bit to the formula with branching paths so there are several ways through each level. There are multiple weapons you can pick up that have different strengths and weaknesses.

I really like the reload and duck mechanic. Most areas have barriers you can duck behind by touching the trackpad. This also reloads your weapon. Ducking while quickly reloading under fire, waiting for the enemy to pause to reload, then quickly popping up to take a few shots is a lot of fun.

The boss fights are interesting. The developer found a clever way to let you dodge attacks in a 3DOF system like the Go. They arranged teleport points that you can jump back and forth between to evade the attacks. So far I've played through the first two levels and the 2nd boss was better and more involved than the first.

I have no idea how long the game is at this point, but  depending on how many levels it has, and if they can keep coming up with interesting bosses, I might raise my score from 4 to 5 stars.

Many thanks to the developers for sorting out the glitches on the Go!

PlayStation VR owners, if you're into VR horror give Home Sweet Home a try. It's terrifying and the reason I bought this title immediately because it's from the same developer.

Hey my trigger on the go controller stops wirking towards the end of the boss level and stops me from shooting the helicopter. Please fix would love to finish this game 4 stars will give 5 once fixed good game tho!! 👍
Ive enjoyed this game and keep replaying it. I really like how the player ducks to reload. Good change from zombies. Great game for the price for sure.
Cool game good to not shoot Zombies for a change.

reviews.review_title: Why so many elitist on this platform
reviews.review_description: Maybe its just because i grew ip paying 60$ for games that would sometimes stink or just be outright broke or just be like a hour but now here you get some kid that thinks because he spends a wopping 4.99 that oh boy "for that kind of money this better be perfect" then you bash it and make others avoid it WHY what do you want? Think about it do you want these games to sell so bad that we see the android effect? Where we get overloaded with "free" to play crap that will dime you to death??? I commend these studios for making cheaper and still very nice game at 5$ thank you keep it up ill be keeping a eye out and to the whiny bashers "ohhh i paid 5 bucks why isnt this just like call of duty" careful what you wish for!....UPDATE i found a bug where sometimes after u die and continue the gun wont fire using oculus controller its not all the time but its happened a couple times
If you are looking for a Tron type game this was my first goto.. except a disc you have a gun.. escape to the grid
Awesome games. Can't figure out how to get past the Tank Boss. When I have rocket launcher I can't use it to destroy incoming missles from tank. Can someone help?
